message:
Trigger docs rebuild after changelog sync

When changelog entries are synced from source repositories, trigger
a rebuild of tenzir/docs to pick up the latest changes.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -162,3 +162,8 @@ jobs:
           empty: false
         env:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}
+
+      - name: Trigger docs rebuild
+        env:
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}
+        run: gh workflow run docs.yaml --repo tenzir/docs
